name: Get CDRs for National Bath Leads

content.query:
select 

in1.Division
,in1.LeadID
,DateReceived
,CheckOutDate
,CheckOutMethod
,in1.LP_LeadSubSourceID

,lds.CustomerID
,EntryDate
,DateEntered
,ApptSet
,NetIssued
,Sat
,Sold
,GrossSalesAmount
,ProductName
,lds.[LP_LastCallResultID]

,CallCount
,FirstCallDate
,LastCallDate

/*
,CallID
,AgentEmployeeID
,CallDate
,LP_CallResultID
,Phone
,LP_CallTypeID
*/
from 
(
select 
Division
,LeadID
,DateReceived
,CheckOutDate
,CheckOutMethod
,LP_LeadSubSourceID
from 
EDW.FACT_INBOUND_QUEUE_LOG
where 
LeadSubSourceID in (
'FHI-954',
'FHI-1318',
'PHI-291',
'PHI-508',
'SWR-2823',
'SWR-3031'
)
and DateReceived between '2023-02-01' and '2023-02-28'
) in1
left join 
(
select
LeadID
,CustomerID
,EntryDate
,DateEntered
,ApptSet
,NetIssued
,Sat
,Sold
,GrossSalesAmount
,prd.ProductName
,[LP_LastCallResultID]
from 
EDW.FACT_LEAD lds
,EDW.DIM_PRODUCT prd
where 
lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
and lds.LeadSubSourceID in (
'FHI-954',
'FHI-1318',
'PHI-291',
'PHI-508',
'SWR-2823',
'SWR-3031'
)
and EntryDate between '2023-02-01' and '2023-02-28'
) lds
on in1.LeadID = lds.LeadID
left join 
(
select
count(CallID) as CallCount
,CustomerID
--,AgentEmployeeID
,min(CallDate) as FirstCallDate
,max(CallDate) as LastCallDate
--,LP_CallResultID
--,Phone
--,LP_CallTypeID
from
EDW.FACT_CALL
WHERE
CallDate >= '2023-02-01'
group by
CustomerID
) cls
on 
cls.CustomerID = lds.CustomerID
